reviews.review_description: The katakanas are bugy and graphics the nothing to brag about. It was also very unrealistic. Would not play agan. The best part about this game is leaving

I haven't played it yet but the comment's sound good I feel great
to play it the pictures on it look 
good GREAT PICS DEVS

developer_response.body:
Hello, if you purchased the full game, you must launch the full game and not the preface. You will find the full game in your list of installed games (Mount Fuji in the background on the thumbnail)
If you have started the full game, in one of the high houses you will find a chest with a letter in it that allows you to move on to the next level.
On this letter, activate the grab with your middle finger and move your "vr index finger" to "leave the island".
To open the chest, kill the armored samurai who should drop a key.
If you still have difficulties, come and explain to me in more detail on the game's discord (link available via sidequest)

Kind regards and thank you for playing this game

Don't forget to review the rating if you liked the game.

reviews.review_description: But I could not reach my sward and quickly died...
Phenomenal. Perfect. Down to the last minute detail.

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much for this comment. Did you know that the full game has been released?
If you liked this level, you will love the full game.

reviews.review_description: Im going to keep it brief. This game needs to fix the balance in damage. It takes like 6 to 7 hits to kill an enemy when it takes 2 to 3 hits for the enemies to kill you. Another thing is that when ever I go to block arrow, the stupid thing decides to glitch through my sword and bounce around on my head, killing me in less than a second. Its still a great game though.

developer_response.body:
-11/26/22-
Hi,
Arrow blocking has been patched on the latest version 1.4.
Sword fights have been revised and corrected.
These new settings make the game easier. However, you have to be discreet to face the enemies as much as possible one after the other, otherwise it's death assured. In addition, in the final version, I planned "3 continues" per level so that players don't get stuck on the same level for too long.

reviews.review_title: This isn’t the review you would expect
reviews.review_description: This game is so good but a quick warning, you will pee your pants playing this game. The random noises of enemies grunting behind the house catches your attention and you are looking around, shaking so much as you don’t know where this low graphics character will jump on you and absolutely obliterate you while you are oblivious to what is happening. The music in the background changes as a low quality samurai approaches you. You hurriedly stab it but it doesn’t take damage and you just die. You press continue and you spawn inside of your enemy who slaughters you. Great game

developer_response.body:
Thanks,
Indeed, there is a problem in the detection of collisions when the movements with the katana are too fast but I am working to correct it as soon as possible.

-11/06/22-
The collision problem (for defense and attack) has been patched in version 1.3
The respawn has been patched (invincible for 5 seconds)

-11/26/22-
Collisions have been fixed for good in version 1.4

reviews.review_description:
I really had a blast playing this game. While there are a few problems with sword collision when attacking. And it would be nice to see some indications on where you can climb and where you can’t. 
It was still fun to play and I can’t wait to see what this game becomes.

developer_response.body:
Thanks
The collision problem was patched in version 1.3
-11/26/2022-
Collisions have been fixed for good in version 1.4
Added an indicator to make climbing easier (thank you for your constructive comment)

reviews.review_description: The Sliver Cack is the best sword in the game
Bottom of note to leave island, select with your hand. You can slow time and hold two swords, like most bows on vr games aim really high, worth buying fir sure

Hello, if you purchased the full game, you must launch the full game and not the preface. You will find the full game in your list of installed games (Mount Fuji in the background on the thumbnail)

reviews.review_title: its a samurai/ronin  game so its great

reviews.review_description: Honestly it was ok i can see that its a little glitchy but the games pretty good and i have high speciations for this game in the future
This game looks good, but it does need a lot of work there are not a lot of setting options enemies are too strong but it's fun

The game is in prerelease! Expect bugs / glitches in the game.
Just because the game isn't suuuuuuper brightly polished is NOT a Reason to uninstall it!
Give the dev some time to finish production and THEN you can judge their game.
I'll play when I find the time to do so. until then, 💥 gabagool 💥

Only criticism i have is health issues. Seeing enemy health would possibly be nice or maybe a certain amount of hits. I have fun but taking 10+ swings to kill a regular enemy seems a bit much, understandable on the armored enemy though. Possibly giving critical points to attack, a damage/health system, or set amount of hits to kill an enemy would make this game to tier in my opinion.
It’s a physics based sword and bow game but there is no sound accept for the music. Can not hear enemies, just really loud string instruments. Could be fun

developer_response.body:
Thank you for this constructive feedback, so I would add an option to adjust the volume of music in the game.

-11-06-22-
Added in version 1.3

reviews.review_description: It’s really fun but after a few times dying it kind of gets boring. The enemies are way too strong a basic one takes like ten swing to kill and they are also really fast so it’s hard to use my bow or stars. I’m not sure if I just haven’t figured it out yet or not but I can’t jump. It would be a lot better if I could jump. I think the game would be more fun and exiting if you were able to customize your character or your item placement. Overall though this is a very good game. I like how you can slow down time so you can basically kill your enemies by pressing the slow button and the swinging your katana. I also really like the climbing feature it’s really fun and no other katana or ninja game have it. The bow and stars are also really useful, let’s say you want to kill an enemy without getting three or four come and chase you you can shoot them (if you hold your bow horizontally your shots are more direct:)) I really like how there is kind of like a whole level of a tutorial that’s super fun to play.

This game is great and has great potential as a samurai vr game it already got the basics and could become better just needs a bigger budget and a team and it'll be one of the best vr games it's alot of fun currently but imagine more
